title: cryptocarya oblonga
intro: Cryptocarya oblonga is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, commonly known as the Indian laurel or the curry tree. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cryptocarya oblonga include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extractions, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
